exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Stand holding the bar behind your head with both hands, elbows pointing up. Extend your arms to press the bar overhead. Focus on isolating the triceps during the press.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Arm Upright Row
exercises.description: Hold the bar with both hands close together. Pull the bar straight up to chest height, leading with your elbows. Keep it close to your body throughout the movement.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Leg Deadlift
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell in one hand and stand on the opposite leg. Hinge forward, keeping your back flat and the barbell close to your body. 

Return to standing and alternate legs.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Leg Deadlift (side facing)
exercises.description: Hold the bar in one hand. Balance on the opposite leg and hinge at the hips, lowering the bar while extending the free leg back. Return to stand.

exercises.name: Landmine Single Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Set up like a hip thrust, but keep one foot grounded and the other leg extended. Drive hips up using one leg. Repeat and switch.

exercises.name: Landmine Single-Arm Press
exercises.alternateName: landmine split stance single arm press
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding the landmine barbell in one hand at shoulder level. Press the bar upward and slightly forward. Keep your core tight and avoid leaning back. Switch arms.

exercises.name: Landmine Skater Squat
exercises.alternateName: Landmine single leg loaded partial squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar and perform a skater squat, lowering your back knee without touching the floor. Keep the bar stable throughout.

exercises.name: Landmine Snatch
exercises.description: Explosively pull the bar up and overhead in one motion using hips and shoulders. A power-based move.

exercises.name: Landmine Split Squat
exercises.description: Place one foot forward and one back in a split stance. Hold the bar at chest level. Lower into a split squat and return to start.

exercises.name: Landmine Split Squat
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell at chest height and step one foot back into a split stance. 

Lower your back knee toward the ground, then push through the front foot to return. Alternate legs.

exercises.name: Landmine Split Squat to Single Arm Press
exercises.alternateName: static lunge to shoulder press landmine
exercises.description:
1) For this exercise, you’ll perform a full lunge maintaining the body weight over top of your back knee not lunging forward with your front knee. 

2) Extend up and locking up. 

3) When you lock out into the shoulder press, ensure that your arm is in line with your body and not out to the side.

exercises.name: Landmine Split Stance Single Arm Row
exercises.description:
Perform a bent-over row while in a split stance. 

Hold the barbell with both hands and pull it toward your chest. 

Alternate leg stances.

exercises.name: Landmine Squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar at chest height with both hands. Squat down, keeping your chest up and heels grounded. Drive up to standing. Repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Squat to High Pull
exercises.description: Hold the bar. Squat down and then pull the bar explosively up toward your chin. A combo of lower and upper body work.

exercises.name: Landmine Squat To Press
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell at chest height. 

Perform a squat, then push through your heels to stand while pressing the barbell overhead in one motion.

exercises.name: Landmine Squat to Single Arm Press
exercises.description:
1)  When performing the squat, sit your hips back behind you. Ensure that your knees don’t come over top of your toes.

2) Keep your chest up and your back set. 

3)  When you do your press, ensure that your arm is in line with your body rather than out to the side.

exercises.name: Landmine Standing Pallof Press
exercises.description: Stand and hold the bar at chest height with both hands. Press the bar forward and hold, resisting rotation. Return to start.

exercises.name: Landmine Step-Through Lunge
exercises.description: Hold the bar at your side and step forward and across into a lunge, passing the bar underneath the front leg as you go. Repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Sumo Deadlift
exercises.description: Set your feet wider than shoulder-width. Hold the bar with both hands. Perform a deadlift by hinging at the hips, then stand tall.

exercises.name: Landmine Sumo Squat
exercises.description:
Stand with a wide stance and hold the barbell with both hands at chest height. 

Squat down deeply, keeping your back straight. 

Push through your heels to return.

exercises.name: Landmine T-Bar Close Grip Row
exercises.description:
1)  To perform this exercise, find the double grip row handle from the cable machine. 

2) Place it under the barbell. 

3) Sit your back with a slight arch. 

4) Squeeze between the shoulder blades to perform the rowing motion.

exercises.name: Landmine Thruster
exercises.description: Hold the bar at chest level. Squat down and press the bar overhead as you stand. A total-body power move.

exercises.name: Landmine V-Sit Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Sit in a V-sit position. Press the bar overhead while maintaining balance and core engagement. Alternate sides or reps.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Parallel Grip Row
exercises.description:
1.Lean back and look up while holding the handles using a closed grip, with arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the handles down in front to the top of your chest, lean back.

3.Straighten your arms completely, returning the handle to the starting position.

4.Do not sway back and forth.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Single Arm Close Grip Row
exercises.alternateName: Single Arm Close Grip Row Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Grasp the handle with your arm extended straight overhead, palm facing in. Lean back slightly and look up.

2.Pull the handle down in front to the top of your chest.

3.Straighten your arm, returning the handle to the starting position, going through a full range of motion. 

4.Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Single Arm Wide
exercises.description:
1.Grasp the handle in one hand with your arm extended straight overhead, palm facing forward. Keep upright back position.

2.Pull the handle down, allowing the elbow wide and outside away from the body.

3.Return the handle back up to the start position, straightening your arm.

4.Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Single Arm Wide Grip
exercises.description:
1.Grasp the handle with your arm extended straight overhead, palm facing in.

2.Pull the handle down in front to the top of your chest.

3.Straighten your arm, returning the handle to the starting position, going through a full range of motion.

4.Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Single Arm Wide Row
exercises.description:
1.Lean back and look up while holding the handle in one hand with your arm extended straight overhead, palm facing forward.

2.Pull the handle down, allowing the elbow wide and outside away from the body.

3.Straighten your arm fully, returning the handle to the top position.

4.Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Straight Arm Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Grip the bar in both hands at chest level with your elbows bent.

2.Push the bar down, fully extending your arms and keeping your shoulders steady.

3.Your hands should finish at the top of your thighs in the downward position.

4. Return to starting position.

5. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lat Machine Wide Grip Scapular Retraction
exercises.description:
1.Sit upright holding the handle using a wide grip with your arms straight out in front and your back flat.

2.Pull your shoulder blades together as much as you can, keeping your arms straight. Remain upright throughout and do not sway back and forth.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown Machine Wide Grip
exercises.description:
1) Grasp the bar using a shoulder-width grip with your arms extended straight overhead.

2) Pull the bar down in front to the top of your chest, bending at the elbows.

3) Straighten your arms fully, returning the bar to the top position.

exercises.name: Lat Stretches & Exercises (Latissimus dorsi) - Ask Doctor Jo
exercises.description: Lat Stretches & Exercises (Latissimus dorsi) - Ask Doctor Jo

exercises.name: Lateral Bear Crawl
exercises.description: Get into a bear crawl position and move laterally, keeping the knees low and core engaged.

exercises.name: Lateral Bound to Jump Switch
exercises.description: From a standing position, bound laterally to one side, landing softly, then immediately perform a small jump switch to alternate legs before bounding to the other side.

exercises.name: Lateral Bounds
exercises.description: Jump laterally from side to side, landing softly on each side while keeping your knees slightly bent.
